Class SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationCase

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment.SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationCase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
SeparatorPerformanceCalculator
public static class SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationCase extends Object implements Serializable
One field/vendor calibration case with modeled and measured entrainment fractions.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim team

  • Constructor Details

    • CalibrationCase

      public CalibrationCase(String caseIdArg, double moig, double mwig, double mgio, double mgiw, double moiw, double mwio, double eoig, double ewig, double egio, double egiw, double eoiw, double ewio)
      Constructs a calibration case.
      Parameters:
      caseIdArg - case identifier
      moig - modeled oil-in-gas
      mwig - modeled water-in-gas
      mgio - modeled gas-in-oil
      mgiw - modeled gas-in-water
      moiw - modeled oil-in-water
      mwio - modeled water-in-oil
      eoig - measured oil-in-gas
      ewig - measured water-in-gas
      egio - measured gas-in-oil
      egiw - measured gas-in-water
      eoiw - measured oil-in-water
      ewio - measured water-in-oil
